programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Moments after taking off from the Norwegian island of Vaeroy, a turboprop plunges into the North Atlantic. (8 of 10) 7+.

programme.title: Decoding History's Prophecies
programme.desc: Nostradamus, Castle Houska, The First Stigmata: Nostradamus wrote hundreds of verses, Houska Castle guards a portal to hell and St Francis claimed the first case of stigmata.

programme.title: Hitler The Junkie
programme.desc: Did drugs affect Hitler's actions and behaviour? Find out in this compelling documentary examining the medications the dictator was taking, how much he took and how often. 7+.

programme.title: Strangest Things
programme.desc: Easter Island's tall stone moai have long captured the global imagination, and there are still mysteries surrounding them. (S3, ep 2) 7+.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Experts look into the fate of TransAsia Flight 235. Dash cam footage captured its final moments, but still the cause of its crash remained a mystery. (S16, ep 8) 7+.

programme.title: Inside Airport Lost & Found
programme.desc: A Wedding Watch and a Weighty Wallet: Airport workers reunite travellers with their missing items, including a sentimental 40th-anniversary gift and a wallet with $1,500. (S1, ep 6) 7+.

programme.title: Yukon Rescue
programme.desc: While hunting for evidence in a possible case of poaching, conservation officer Logan encounters a potentially life-threatening situation with two aggressive bears.

programme.title: Made In A Day
programme.desc: This is the story of how the world's number one hot sauce is made on a massive scale. (S1, ep 8) 7+.

programme.title: Abandoned Megastructures
programme.desc: Jay and the team search the former headquarters of Pabst Brewing Company, finding an intriguing blueprint and valuable collectibles. (S1, ep 7) 7+.

programme.title: Abandoned Megastructures
programme.desc: The team salvage elegant furnishings and historic gems, as they search a former bank that once held the fortunes of rich oil barons. (S1, ep 8) 7+.

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: Discover what a laser beam and applesauce have in common, then go behind the scenes of a factory that produces a billion onion rings every year. (S2, ep 18) 7+.

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: Visit a bakery making millions of donuts a year, meet the team behind pepperoni rolls and take a bite out of these hand-dipped, chocolaty snacks. (S2, ep 19) 7+.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Zoo
programme.desc: Three new baby pronghorns are welcomed to the zoo, but only a few get to meet their adult roommates for the first time. (S1, ep 9) 7+.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Zoo
programme.desc: Staff at the Columbus Zoo work around the clock to save a mandrill named Tatu who's in a life-or-death struggle. (S1, ep 9) 7+.

programme.title: Cruise TV With Loveitbookit
programme.desc: Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one.

programme.title: Dutch Caribbean Coastguard
programme.desc: An NH-90 naval helicopter intercepts a fleeing drug boat, as the Metal Shark crew attempts to save undocumented migrants from a sinking boat. 7+.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation: Special Report
programme.desc: A closer look at three air tragedies reveals what happens when commercial planes get caught in the heat of war. (S1, ep 5) 7+.

programme.title: Drain The Oceans
programme.desc: Dark secrets resurface as the series hunts deep below the waves for evidence of North America's history of dinosaurs, trade, slavery and war. (S1, ep 3) 7+.

programme.title: Strangest Things
programme.desc: Etruscan Mummy: Did a 200-year-old mechanical man really beat the world's best chess players? Who made it, and how does it work? (S3, ep 9) 7+.

programme.title: Disaster Autopsy
programme.desc: Lac-Mégantic train crash, Imperial Sugar refinery explosion, Ever Given container ship accident. (6 of 8) 7+.

programme.title: Car S.O.S
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz take on a Mercedes SLK with huge sentimental value for owner Lili, but this stylish roadster hides major mysteries. (2 of 10) 7+.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Moments after taking off from the Norwegian island of Vaeroy, a turboprop plunges into the North Atlantic. (8 of 10) 7+.

programme.title: Nazi Megastructures
programme.desc: The story of how Nazi engineers responded to Hitler's megalomaniac vision by building some of the largest tanks and land battleships. 7+.

programme.title: The Hindenburg Disaster
programme.desc: It was the largest and most celebrated airship ever built, but on 6 May 1937 it caught fire, killing 36 passengers and crew. What caused the tragedy? 7+.

programme.title: Car S.O.S
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz secretly fix up Italian car nut Gary's rusty World rally champ.But when tragedy strikes, the job takes on a very different meaning. 7+.

programme.title: Inside Sydney Airport
programme.desc: Lightning has struck an incoming flight. As engineers assess the damage, high winds lead to runway closures and another plane starts leaking a potentially dangerous liquid. 7+.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: A look at the fate of Korean Air Cargo flight 8509. 4 died in the explosion near Stansted Airport, making it the airline's fifth accident in two-and-a-half years. 7+.

programme.title: Car S.O.S
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz leave four wheels behind to tackle the ambitious restoration of a 1973 Triumph Bonneville motorbike, belonging to ex-postmaster Ian. (S14, ep 3) 7+.

programme.title: Car S.O.S
programme.desc: Presenter Tim and master mechanic Fuzz whisk a Ford Anglia from its garage in Bournemouth. Can they surprise owner James with their secret motor makeover? 7+.

programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: Margot, caught off guard by an unplanned litter of puppies, prepares to leave her Yukon trapline early. Billy embarks on a backwoods salvage mission.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Terrorists claimed responsibility when Metrojet 9268 broke up in the air after leaving Sharm el Sheikh. But can experts prove what really happened? (S16, ep 5) 7+.

programme.title: Inside Airport Lost & Found
programme.desc: Old Photos and a New Student: Airport workers reunite travellers with their missing items, including a collection of old photographs with their owners. (S1, ep 7) 7+.

programme.title: To Catch A Smuggler
programme.desc: HSI busts an illegal gun operation in NYC, while CBP is kept busy with a meth surge from Mexico. (S3, ep 13) 7+.

programme.title: Lords Of War
programme.desc: Weapons expert Sean Rich and his team of military aficionados travel America in search of rare and priceless antique weapons and militaria. 7+.

programme.title: Abandoned Megastructures
programme.desc: Follow shrewd scavengers and refurbishers as they search long-abandoned buildings for items of high value or huge historical importance. (S1, ep 9) 7+.

programme.title: Abandoned Megastructures
programme.desc: Salvage experts Dan, Mark and Jay head to the barns where the Chrysler motor franchise began - a gold pot of vintage vehicles and signs. (S1, ep 10) 7+.

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: Find out what it takes to make a 5,000-pound monster cheese wheel, before taking a bite out of these irresistible blondies. (S2, ep 20) 7+.

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: Discover how to make three million deep-fried cheese curds in a day, how to turn a mountain of pecans into cow patties and why popping candy pops. (S2, ep 21) 7+.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Zoo
programme.desc: The entire zoo is on baby watch as Phoebe the elephant goes into labor. Meanwhile, a family of flying foxes get their annual exam. (S1, ep 11) 7+.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Zoo
programme.desc: The Columbus Zoo's new resident, a polar bear named Lee, arrives in Ohio and must get through quarantine. (S1, ep 12) 7+.

programme.title: Cruise TV With Loveitbookit
programme.desc: Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one.

programme.title: Dutch Caribbean Coastguard
programme.desc: The Coastguard inspects a suspicious Colombian ship with a concealed hatch, as the Metal Shark team rescue a missing Swedish sailboat. 7+.

programme.title: Journey Across Jungles: The China-Laos Railway
programme.desc: From a bustling market in Kunming to the main starting point of the ancient Tea-Horse Road. (S1, ep 1) 7+.

programme.title: Journey Across Jungles: The China-Laos Railway
programme.desc: After crossing into Laos, Thomas discovers a land of timeless traditions. Khmu villagers welcome Thomas to share rice husking, fishing and meals. (S1, ep 2) 7+.

programme.title: Lost Worlds of The Mediterranean
programme.desc: The plug is pulled on the glittering Med, unlocking mysteries of the Greeks and mighty Romans and revealing powerful forces lurking underwater. 7+.

programme.title: Strangest Things
programme.desc: A message from the Ice Age, found in Turkey. What can its strange depictions of birds, a scorpion and a headless man mean? (S3, ep 10) 7+.

programme.title: Disaster Autopsy
programme.desc: Three real world disasters forensically dissected. Fukushima nuclear plant, a Manhattan crane collapse, the fire on aircraft carrier USS Forrestal. 7+. (7 of.

programme.title: Car S.O.S
programme.desc: Drummer Fuzz Townshend joins presenter Tim Shaw on a series of secret fix-up missions, wowing British car owners with expert revamps of their iconic motors. 7+.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Investigators uncover a problem threatening every 747 in the sky as they delve into the worst aviation disaster ever to occur in the Netherlands. 7+.

programme.title: Hitler's Jet Caves
programme.desc: Discover the Messerschmitt Me 262. One of the most technologically advanced aeroplanes of World War II, it was built in a subterranean cave. 7+.

programme.title: Planes That Changed History
programme.desc: When it first flew in 1952, the Avro Vulcan pushed the boundaries of aviation by flying higher and farther than any previous long-range bomber. (2 of 5) 7+.

programme.title: Car S.O.S
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz leave four wheels behind to tackle the ambitious restoration of a 1973 Triumph Bonneville motorbike, belonging to ex-postmaster Ian. (S14, ep 3) 7+.

programme.title: Inside Sydney Airport
programme.desc: A duty manager encounters a suspicious package, a rookie handles two medical emergencies in one hour and a freight handling crew struggle with a bulging cargo pod. 7+.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: In 1978, 146 passengers died when a PSA flight crashed into a Cessna. Who was responsible for the deadly crash that also killed seven people on the ground? 7+.
